texto: Why Judge someone? What gives YOU the right? We are all humans and we all have stories. Don't be critical on people...For how would you like it if they said that about you?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Violet Lillydale: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Why Judge someone? What gives YOU the right? We are all humans and we all have stories. Don't be …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, judgement, judge pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de vida.
